question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the data labels?

options.A: Others has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.B: Huawei has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.C: Apple has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.D: Samsung has the largest market share among the categories shown.

explanation: From the labels, Huawei has the highest share (84%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Huawei is largest when relying on visual comparison.
